notes: Monthly market-neutral commodity reversal basket from the approved Yang/Goncu/Pantelous commodity reversal card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX D1 host chart, ranks XTI, XNG, XAU, and XAG by prior one-month D1 log return, buys the worst performer, and shorts the best performer when at least one selected leg is energy.
Q02 must evaluate the logical basket symbol, not standalone single-symbol fanout rows.
